properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am thinking of the rapture in our blessed home on high, When the redeemed are gathering in; How we’ll raise the heavenly anthem in that city in the sky. When the redeemed are gathering in.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When the redeemed are gathering in, Washed like the snow, and free from all sin; How we will shout, and how we will sing, When the redeemed are gathering in.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There will be a great procession over on the streets of gold, When the redeemed are gathering in; O what music, O what singing, o’er the city will be rolled. When the redeemed are gathering in.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Saints will sing redemption’s story with their voices clear and strong, When the redeemed are gathering in; Then the angels all will listen, For they cannot join that song, When the redeemed are gathering in.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Then the Saviour will give orders to prepare the banquet board, When the redeemed are gathering in; And we’ll hear His invitation, “Come, ye blessed of the Lord,” When the redeemed are gathering in.
